test_type: Speed Optimization Sprint - Parallel Execution & Time Estimates
summary: Tested speed optimization features: parallel images+voices execution, estimated time fields, stage labels, and public endpoint availability. All backend tests pass (12/12). Frontend UI components verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Speed optimization sprint tested. Job e100c0cb-5296-4333-a2a0-a3a2af1c8ba8 confirmed parallel execution with parallel_ms=59335, total_ms=69396 (down from ~79s baseline). All stage labels, time estimates, and public endpoints working.

backend_parallel_execution_log_evidence.detail: Backend logs show 'Starting PARALLEL execution: images + voices' followed by 'Parallel stages completed in 59335ms'

pipeline_create_returns_estimated_total_.detail: Job creation includes estimated_total_sec field (70s for 3-scene job)

pipeline_status_returns_time_estimates.detail: Status endpoint returns estimated_total_sec=70, estimated_remaining_sec populated during processing

job_timing_includes_parallel_ms.detail: Completed job timing: parallel_ms=59335, images_ms=57675, voices_ms=10961, total_ms=69396

credit_finalization_works.detail: Completed job has credit_status='finalized' (verified in previous iteration)

cache_hit_field_present.detail: Job documents include cache_hit field for scene caching

plan_scene_limits_in_options.detail: GET /api/pipeline/options returns plan_scene_limits: free=3, starter=4, pro=6

frontend_input_phase_components.detail: Title input, story textarea, generate button, style grid, age/voice options all present with data-testid attributes

frontend_canvas_step_indicators.detail: Canvas steps (prompt, scenes, images, voices, preview) visible in header

frontend_processing_phase_testids.detail: ProcessingPhase has data-testid for: time-estimate, parallel-indicator, first-image-hero, filmstrip

frontend_progressive_generation_componen.detail: ProgressiveGeneration component handles WebSocket events for real-time scene/image/voice updates

frontend_preview_page.detail: Story preview page shows all 3 scenes with images, audio, download options, and export buttons
